name: Armor Skin
description: Your skin becomes like armor, granting you a natural armor bonus.
benefits: You gain a +1 natural armor bonus to AC, or your existing natural armor bonus increases by +1. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Epic Weapon Focus
description: Choose one type of weapon. You are especially good at using that weapon in combat.
benefits: +2 bonus on all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: Epic Weapon Specialization
description: Choose one type of weapon for which you have already selected Weapon Specialization. You deal extra damage when using this weapon.
benefits: +4 bonus on all damage rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: Epic Toughness
description: You are significantly tougher than normal.
benefits: You gain +30 hit points. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Smiting
description: You can make exceptionally powerful smite attacks.
benefits: When you make a smite attack, you deal +3 damage per point of Charisma bonus (instead of +1).

name: Epic Prowess
description: You are more skilled in combat than you once were.
benefits: +1 bonus on all attack rolls.

name: Epic Spell Penetration
description: Your spells break through spell resistance much more easily than normal.
benefits: +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome a creature's spell resistance.

name: Improved Combat Casting
description: You are adept at casting spells in combat.
benefits: +4 bonus on Concentration checks to cast defensively.

name: Improved Spell Capacity (10th)
description: You can use 10th-level spell slots.
benefits: You gain one spell slot per day of any spell level up to 10th. You do not learn a spell of that level automatically. You must still have an ability score high enough to cast spells of that level.

name: Legendary Climber
description: You can climb rapidly.
benefits: You can ignore any penalties for accelerated climbing or rapid climbing.

name: Legendary Rider
description: You can ride creatures not normally suitable as mounts.
benefits: You can ride any creature, even creatures not trained for riding. You do not take penalties for riding a creature without a saddle.

name: Epic Reputation
description: You are famous throughout the land.
benefits: Your reputation provides a +4 bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks.

name: Overwhelming Critical
description: Your critical hits are incredibly deadly.
benefits: When you score a critical hit, the target must make a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Strength modifier) or be killed instantly.

name: Perfect Two-Weapon Fighting
description: You are the ultimate two-weapon fighter.
benefits: You can make as many attacks with your off-hand weapon as with your primary weapon, using the same base attack bonus.

name: Planar Turning
description: You can turn or rebuke outsiders.
benefits: You can use your turn/rebuke undead ability to turn/rebuke outsiders as if they were undead.

name: Superior Initiative
description: You react even faster than normal in combat.
benefits: +4 bonus on initiative checks (stacks with Improved Initiative).

name: Epic Fortitude
description: You have tremendously high fortitude.
benefits: +4 bonus on Fortitude saving throws.

name: Epic Reflexes
description: You have tremendously fast reflexes.
benefits: +4 bonus on Reflex saving throws.

name: Epic Will
description: You have tremendous willpower.
benefits: +4 bonus on Will saving throws.

name: Damage Reduction
description: You can shrug off some damage from attacks.
benefits: You gain damage reduction 3/–. This feat can be taken multiple times, increasing DR by 3 each time.

name: Epic Skill Focus
description: Choose a skill. You have epic proficiency with that skill.
benefits: +10 bonus to the selected skill (stacks with Skill Focus).

name: Legendary Commander
description: You are an inspiration to your allies in battle.
benefits: Allies within 30 feet gain +2 morale bonus on saves against fear and +1 morale bonus on attack rolls.

name: Devastating Critical
description: Your critical hits deal tremendous damage.
benefits: When you score a critical hit, you deal +2d6 bonus damage per point of your critical multiplier.

name: Epic Dodge
description: Once per round, you can avoid any one attack.
benefits: Once per round, when struck by an attack, you may automatically avoid all damage from that attack.

name: Epic Leadership
description: You attract more and more powerful followers.
benefits: +4 to Leadership score.

name: Improved Spell Capacity (11th)
description: You can use 11th-level spell slots.
benefits: You gain one spell slot per day of any spell level up to 11th.

name: Improved Spell Capacity (12th)
description: You can use 12th-level spell slots.
benefits: You gain one spell slot per day of any spell level up to 12th.

name: Automatic Quicken Spell
description: You can quicken spells without using higher-level slots.
benefits: You may quicken spells of a chosen level (up to 6th) without increasing the spell level. Each time you take this feat, it applies to a new spell level.

name: Automatic Silent Spell
description: You can cast silent spells without using higher-level slots.
benefits: You may cast silent spells of a chosen level (up to 9th) without increasing the spell level.

name: Automatic Still Spell
description: You can cast still spells without using higher-level slots.
benefits: You may cast still spells of a chosen level (up to 9th) without increasing the spell level.

name: Blinding Speed
description: You can act with incredible speed.
benefits: You can act as if hasted for 5 rounds per day. This feat can be taken multiple times, granting 5 additional rounds each time.

name: Combat Archery
description: You can fire arrows in melee without penalty.
benefits: You do not provoke attacks of opportunity when firing a bow, and you can fire into melee without the standard -4 penalty.

name: Dire Charge
description: Your charges are devastating.
benefits: When you charge, you can make a full attack at the end of your charge.

name: Distant Shot
description: You can fire projectile weapons at great distances.
benefits: You can shoot a projectile weapon at targets beyond normal range. Your range increment increases by 50%.

name: Epic Endurance
description: You have tremendous stamina.
benefits: +10 bonus on Constitution checks to avoid nonlethal damage, continue running, hold your breath, etc.

name: Epic Speed
description: You can move faster than normal.
benefits: +30 feet to speed. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Fast Healing
description: You heal damage at an incredible rate.
benefits: You gain fast healing 3. This feat can be taken multiple times, increasing fast healing by 3 each time.

name: Great Charisma
description: Your force of personality is overwhelming.
benefits: +1 to Charisma. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Constitution
description: You are incredibly hardy.
benefits: +1 to Constitution. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Dexterity
description: You are incredibly agile.
benefits: +1 to Dexterity. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Intelligence
description: Your intellect is astounding.
benefits: +1 to Intelligence. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Strength
description: Your might is legendary.
benefits: +1 to Strength. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Wisdom
description: Your insight is profound.
benefits: +1 to Wisdom. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Improved Arrow of Death
description: Your arrows of death are more effective.
benefits: The DC of your arrow of death increases by 2.

name: Improved Aura of Courage
description: Your aura of courage is more powerful.
benefits: Your aura of courage grants immunity to fear to you and all allies within 30 feet.

name: Improved Darkvision
description: Your darkvision extends much farther.
benefits: Your darkvision range increases by 60 feet. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Improved Favored Enemy
description: You are exceptionally deadly against your favored enemies.
benefits: +3 bonus on Bluff, Listen, Sense Motive, Spot, and Survival checks, and +3 bonus on damage rolls against one favored enemy.

name: Improved Ki Strike
description: Your ki strike is more powerful.
benefits: Your unarmed strikes are treated as epic weapons for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction.

name: Improved Low-Light Vision
description: You can see farther in dim light.
benefits: Your low-light vision increases. You can see four times as far as a human in dim light.

name: Improved Manyshot
description: You can fire even more arrows simultaneously.
benefits: As Manyshot, but you can fire two arrows per five points of base attack bonus.

name: Improved Sneak Attack
description: Your sneak attacks deal extra damage.
benefits: +1d6 sneak attack damage. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Improved Stunning Fist
description: Your stunning fist is more effective.
benefits: The DC of your stunning fist increases by 2.

name: Infinite Deflection
description: You can deflect any number of projectiles.
benefits: You can deflect any number of ranged attacks per round, as long as you have at least one hand free.

name: Instant Reload
description: You can reload crossbows instantly.
benefits: You can reload any crossbow as a free action.

name: Legendary Tracker
description: You can track across any surface.
benefits: You can track creatures across water, through the air, or through solid rock. You can track creatures through teleportation.

name: Legendary Wrestler
description: You are exceptionally skilled at grappling.
benefits: +4 bonus on grapple checks. You can grapple creatures up to two size categories larger than you.

name: Multispell
description: You can cast an additional quickened spell per round.
benefits: You may cast one additional quickened spell per round.

name: Penetrate Damage Reduction
description: Your attacks ignore some damage reduction.
benefits: Your attacks ignore up to 5 points of a creature's damage reduction. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Permanent Emanation
description: One of your spells becomes a permanent emanation around you.
benefits: Choose a spell with a duration of concentration, rounds, or minutes that affects an area. That spell becomes a permanent emanation from you.

name: Positive Energy Aura
description: You radiate positive energy.
benefits: You radiate a continuous positive energy aura in a 20-foot radius. Living creatures in the aura gain fast healing 2. Undead take 2d6 damage per round.

name: Spell Knowledge
description: You know more spells than normal.
benefits: Add two spells to your spells known. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Spell Opportunity
description: You can cast spells as attacks of opportunity.
benefits: You can cast a quickened spell as an attack of opportunity.

name: Spell Stowaway
description: You can hide a spell within another spell.
benefits: You can cast a spell and have it take effect later, triggered by a specified event.

name: Spontaneous Spell
description: You can spontaneously convert spells.
benefits: Choose one spell you know. You can spontaneously convert other spells into this spell, as a cleric does with cure spells.

name: Storm of Throws
description: You can throw multiple weapons simultaneously.
benefits: As a full-round action, you can throw up to four one-handed or light thrown weapons.

name: Swarm of Arrows
description: You can fire arrows at multiple targets.
benefits: As a full-round action, you can fire one arrow at each opponent within 30 feet.

name: Tenacious Magic
description: Your spells are difficult to dispel.
benefits: Choose one spell. Whenever that spell is targeted by dispel magic, the caster must make a dispel check against a DC of 25 + your caster level (instead of 11 + your caster level).

name: Epic Trap Sense
description: Your trap sense is legendary.
benefits: +2 bonus to AC and Reflex saves against traps. Stacks with other trap sense bonuses.

name: Two-Weapon Rend
description: Striking with both weapons, you can rend your foe.
benefits: If you hit with both weapons, you deal an extra 2d6+Strength modifier damage.

name: Uncanny Accuracy
description: Your ranged attacks are supernaturally accurate.
benefits: You ignore all penalties for range, cover, and concealment when making ranged attacks.

name: Vorpal Strike
description: Your unarmed strikes can behead opponents.
benefits: On a natural 20 with an unarmed strike (when the roll is confirmed as a critical hit), you sever the opponent's head (if it has one).

name: Zone of Animation
description: You can animate many undead at once.
benefits: You can control up to 100 HD worth of undead per caster level (instead of 4 HD per level).
